inputs.label: Current Age
inputs.businessContext: The individual's current age in years.

businessContext_i18n.en: The individual's current age in years.

inputs.label: Retirement Age
inputs.businessContext: Age at which individual plans to retire and become eligible for Medicare.

businessContext_i18n.en: Age at which individual plans to retire and become eligible for Medicare.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bireyin emekli olmayı ve Medicare'e hak kazanmayı planladığı yaş.

inputs.label: Current Annual Medical Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Current annual out-of-pocket medical expenses in US dollars.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current annual out-of-pocket medical expenses in US dollars.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ABD doları cinsinden mevcut yıllık cepten yapılan tıbbi harcamalar.

inputs.label: Expected Healthcare Inflation Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual expected growth rate of medical costs in percent.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual expected growth rate of medical costs in percent.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tıbbi maliyetlerin yıllık beklenen büyüme oranı (yüzde).

inputs.label: Years in Retirement
inputs.businessContext: Expected number of years in retirement during which medical expenses will be incurred.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected number of years in retirement during which medical expenses will be incurred.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tıbbi giderlerin oluşacağı beklenen emeklilik yılı sayısı.

inputs.label: Expected Investment Return Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual expected rate of return on savings in percent, used to discount future expenses.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual expected rate of return on savings in percent, used to discount future expenses.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gelecekteki giderleri iskonto etmek için kullanılan yıllık beklenen tasarruf getiri oranı (yüzde).
